name: Ellentis
short_description: Strategic card game set in a fantasy world. Create powerful combinations by combining elements and card levels in a unique circle system. Simple to learn, but full of depth - every decision matters. Master the mechanics, take risks and achieve the highest scores!
detailed_description:
Ellentis is a strategic card game set in a unique world of five elements. Simple rules hide a depth of gameplay, where every decision matters. Create combinations, manage your hand and maximize points by arranging cards in a circle on the board.

Each card in the game has parameters such as:

Color - red, yellow, green, blue, brown

Rank - 1, 2, 3, 4, 5

Material - Each of the 13 materials provides unique mechanics during the game

Essence - The degree of essence of a card affects the score of the arrangement in the circle.

Circle mechanics - cards are placed in 5 slots in a circle on the board, and then all created arrangements are scored.

Slot upgrade mechanics - Each slot in the circle can be upgraded to provide an additional effect. Use this opportunity on your way to victory.

Special Powers - You'll be able to use 3 special powers of your choice during the game, which you'll use at critical moments to succeed.

Different deck types - Each deck is a new way to play the game to master.

Achievement System - For each achievement you earn in the game, you unlock new content: new decks, card materials, slot upgrades, and special powers!

Easy to learn, hard to master - every game is a new challenge.

Experiment with combinations, plan your moves, and discover how far you can go in the world of Ellentis!

supported_languages: English, Polish, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Czech, Danish, Finnish, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Swedish, Turkish, Hungarian
